name: S-16 --apply-to-rules --emit-audit appends a jsonl line with rule-auto-demoted action per the architecture audit chain
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch tree/g && printf '2026-05-20T00:00:00Z' > .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch/g.txt && printf '
rules:
  - {id: r, rule_state: block, provenance: [{class: published-standard, source: g}]}
' > tree/g/x.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/freshness-gate.sh" --apply-to-rules --tree tree --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z --emit-audit audit.jsonl && [ -s audit.jsonl ] && grep -q 'rule-auto-demoted' audit.jsonl && echo audited 1>&2
